@graph.description: This dataset documents an experiment involving the automated build and performance evaluation of QUIC-related software libraries and client/server applications. The workflow included node preparation via reset and bootstrap scripts, installation of necessary software packages, and the compilation of libraries such as BoringSSL, lsquic, and quiche. Client and server applications were executed repeatedly, with performance metrics collected and aggregated to assess the impact of configurable parameters like bandwidth limits and file sizes, orchestrated by a pos. The dataset includes per-run logs, configuration files, and evaluation scripts used to generate performance reports.
@graph.name: QUIC Software Library Build and Performance Evaluation on Cesis and Nida Nodes
